evals.name: demo-deck-3-slides
evals.prompt: I have an HTML slide deck at ./evals/fixtures/demo.html — please convert it to a PDF at ./evals/fixtures/demo.pdf. Make sure every slide comes through and the text is selectable.

assertions.name: pdf-has-3-pages
assertions.description: PDF has exactly 3 pages (one per <section class="slide"> in source)

assertions.name: no-missing-reveal-cards
assertions.description: Slide 2's three reveal-cards (html-ppt decks / frontend-design / Hand-written HTML) are all present in the PDF — verifies the bundled-Chromium PDF paint bug is avoided by using system Chrome

assertions.name: slide-numbers-correct
assertions.description: Each page shows the correct slide-number (1/3, 2/3, 3/3)
